legislation_refs.name: section 4(c)(3)
legislation_refs.context: The Task Force shall terminate 60 days after the date on which the Task Force submits the report required under section 4(c)(3).

named_docs.name: Initial Report on Workplace Surveillance Prevalence
named_docs.owner_org: White House Task Force on Workplace Surveillance and Technologies
named_docs.context: Not later than one year after enactment, Task Force shall submit initial report including comprehensive review of prevalence of workplace surveillance across different industries

named_docs.name: Interim Report on Impact of Workplace Surveillance
named_docs.owner_org: White House Task Force on Workplace Surveillance and Technologies
named_docs.context: Not later than one year after initial report, Task Force shall submit interim report with findings on impact of workplace surveillance and automated decision systems

named_docs.name: Final Report on Workplace Surveillance Strategy
named_docs.owner_org: White House Task Force on Workplace Surveillance and Technologies
named_docs.context: Not later than one year after interim report, Task Force shall submit final report with recommendations on government-wide coordinated strategy to address workplace surveillance
